ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "person_ref" TEXT /* Reference identifier for the player */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the player */,
  "given_name" TEXT /* Given name of the player */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Player's nationality */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Player's height in centimeters */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Player's weight in kilograms */,
  "batting_hand" TEXT /* Batting hand (e.g., right, left) */,
  "throwing_hand" TEXT /* Throwing hand (e.g., right, left) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the player record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the player record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the league */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the league (e.g., city, country) */,
  "commissioner" TEXT /* Name of the league commissioner */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the league */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the league record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the league record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the team belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team (e.g., city, state) */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "manager" TEXT /* Name of the team manager */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the team record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the team record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "code" TEXT /* Code of the position */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the position */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the position */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the position record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the position record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stints" (
  "stint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stint */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the stint */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the stint */,
  "stint_number" INTEGER /* Stint number (e.g., 0 for the first stint) */,
  "reason_for_leaving" TEXT /* Reason why the player left the team (e.g., traded, retired) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the stint record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the stint record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stints_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stints_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stints_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_entries" (
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league */,
  "entry_date" TEXT /* Date of the entry */,
  "entry_name" TEXT /* Name of the entry */,
  "entry_type" TEXT /* Type of entry (e.g., rookie, veteran) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the entry record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the entry record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_entries_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_entries_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_entries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "stint_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stint */,
  "position_code" TEXT /* Code of the position */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the position */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the position */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Status indicating if the player was injured during this position (e.g., injured, healthy) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the position record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the position record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_positions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_positions_stint_id FOREIGN KEY ("stint_id") REFERENCES player_stints ("stint_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the source was published */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the source */,
  "published_by" TEXT /* Name of the entity that published the source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the source record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the source record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_entries" (
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league */,
  "entry_date" TEXT /* Date of the entry */,
  "entry_name" TEXT /* Name of the entry */,
  "entry_type" TEXT /* Type of data entry (e.g., game, statistic) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the data entry record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the data entry record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_entries_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_entries_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_entries_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_entries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
